event: White Nights Street Scene in St. Petersburg
description: A black-and-white woodcut or linocut depicting an urban scene. A solitary dark figure sits on the ground at center, leaning against a wall between a tall stack of firewood at left and a wooden shed at right. Above, the upper floors and roofline of a tall building are visible. A street sign is attached to a pole. In the foreground, a cobblestone or wooden-planked street stretches across with what appear to be bollards or posts. The composition uses strong contrasts between black and white areas with bold, expressive hatching lines.
